mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName, sort_no AS sortNo, status, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, deleted FROM sys_role
deleted = 0
AND (role_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR role_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
ORDER BY sort_no, id

SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName, sort_no AS sortNo, status, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, deleted FROM sys_role WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_no
SELECT id, role_code AS roleCode, role_name AS roleName, sort_no AS sortNo, status, remark, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, deleted FROM sys_role WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id FROM sys_role WHERE role_code = #{roleCode} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role(role_code, role_name, sort_no, status, remark) VALUES (#{roleCode},#{roleName},#{sortNo},#{status},#{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_role SET role_code=#{roleCode}, role_name=#{roleName}, sort_no=#{sortNo}, status=#{status}, remark=#{remark} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_role SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
